news.t: Specialty biotech funds jump on promising coronavirus, funding news
3 ETFs in Focus as Race for Vaccine Intensifies

holdings.infoBox: PTH is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Roivant Sciences stock at 4.95%, Tango Therapeutics at 4.24%, Praxis Precision Medicines at 4.09%, United Therapeutics at 3.29%, and Axsome Therapeutics at 3.20%.

overview.description: The Invesco Dorsey Wright Healthcare Momentum ETF (PTH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks an index of U.S. healthcare firms selected and weighted by price momentum. PTH was launched on Oct 12, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Specialty biotech funds jump on promising coronavirus, funding news
data.text: Specialized health-care exchange-traded funds outperformed the broader stock market Wednesday even as stocks rebounded from a sell-off that left the Nasdaq Composite Index  in correction territory. Th...

data.title: 3 ETFs in Focus as Race for Vaccine Intensifies
data.text: Several companies sit at the forefront of developing a coronavirus vaccine. Gain exposure to each using the following three ETFs.
